comment.body:
This my intraday analysis trying to be at least a 20% accurate as our mamma , at least 20% 😂 


• Center of Gravity (6378) sets the opening bias.
• Above the Center during the first hour → high odds of rotation to the (big gamma)  Pivot 6375; if price breaks and holds there, a clear path opens to the CALL WALL 6400.
• Below the Center → price is drawn toward the Downside Magnet 6350 and the Downside Pivot 6360.
• Clean loss of 6350 can stretch pressure to 6325; a decisive break of 6325 unlocks 6300 / 6323 (weekly pivot).
• Theoretical range (± 0.76 % from 6359) ≈ 6316 – 6412.

Management hints
• Watch 6400 – 6300: flow tends to stall at these nodes.
• After 14:00 ET, pull-backs under 6360 usually meet persistent selling; above 6375, buying flow strengthens.
